case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DEANNA LEWIS

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PETITION TO OPEN CASE NUMBER, MOTION TO COMPEL IN RELATION TO UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE

UNINSURED MOTORIST, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DEANNA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-20-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-05-2005

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL CONTACT COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER TO SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITION AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED BY FEBRUARY 14, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO COMPEL CLAIMANT TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; ORDER COMPELLING CLAIMANT TO ATTEND DEPOSITION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-2005 CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

PETITION TO COMPEL CLAIMANT TO RESPOND TO FORM INTEROGGS & PRODUCTION OF DOCS; PETITION TO COMPEL CLAIMANT TO ATTEND DEPO, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
